title: Bastion Closes $12B Corporate Credit Fund with Record Commitments
content: Bastion Investment Group announced the successful close of its latest corporate credit fund, surpassing target commitments. The fund, which focuses on investment-grade and high-yield credit across North America and Europe, attracted strong investor demand from pension funds, endowments, and sovereign wealth funds. This achievement underscores Bastion's position as a leading alternative investor in credit markets.

title: Bastion Real Estate Portfolio Achieves Record Returns
content: The firm's global real estate platform delivered exceptional returns across its diversified portfolio. Key drivers included successful value-add acquisitions, strategic dispositions in mature markets, and disciplined capital allocation. This performance reflects the team's expertise in identifying and executing on compelling real estate opportunities worldwide through Bastion's investment process.

title: Bastion Expands Asian Operations with New Regional Office
content: Bastion Investment Group opened its new regional headquarters in Singapore to better serve its growing Asian investor base and capitalize on emerging opportunities. The office will focus on credit investments, real estate acquisitions, and asset-based finance partnerships across the region. This expansion reinforces Bastion's commitment to geographic diversification and global growth.
